strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multiple databases
Active AI-agent and MCP tooling work at current role aligns with required AI agent development
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and workshop/teaching background
concerns: Resume lists Kotlin minimally and Nest.js/Vitest are not explicitly mentioned
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate less depth in the primary stack than years suggest
Limited explicit cloud platform breadth (AWS shown, GCP/Azure not evidenced)
response.justification: The candidate brings well over the required 6+ years of full-stack experience with strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB exposure, plus directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling work at their current role. Engineering craftsmanship signals (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, teaching) are unusually strong. Gaps are around explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin/Java evidence and broader cloud platform breadth, which would warrant clarification but do not undermine overall fit for the role.
